lines.speaker: AI
lines.text: Systems Critical. Engine failing at 46%. Life Support Systems at 65% and dropping. Water Supply at 13%. Radiation Shielding Matrix at 52% and dropping.

lines.speaker: Macklin
lines.text: Jesus, well can’t you fix it?

lines.speaker: Macklin
lines.text: Well why the hell aren’t the maintenance teams fixing this, then?

lines.speaker: AI
lines.text: Unable to contact maintenance teams. All are presumed dead.

lines.speaker: Macklin
lines.text: Are you serious? What on Earth happened?

lines.speaker: Macklin
lines.text: Well, that’s just a fantastic answer that gets me nowhere. Sigh. Alright, I guess at least give me an idea of what all this means.

lines.speaker: AI
lines.text: Systems critical. If repairs are not made in the next 46 minutes, Flotilla City #7 will be rendered inert or uninhabitable.

lines.speaker: Macklin
lines.text: Inert?! You mean the city’s gonna fall out of the sky?!

lines.speaker: Macklin
lines.text: I get it, I get it, you don’t need to repeat yourself.

lines.speaker: AI
lines.text: I was only answering your question.
